title: Executive Order 12350—Termination of Urban and Community Impact Analyses

flags.justification: This revokes a prior analytical requirement, reducing rather than creating authority.
A revocation action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A one-time revocation action, not an ongoing authority grant.
This ends a prior internal analytical requirement rather than removing a check on an outside party.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A single-sentence revocation of a prior Carter-era urban-policy analytical requirement, part of the broader early-Reagan deregulatory agenda, but narrow in its own textual scope.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. A one-sentence revocation of EO 12074's urban and community impact analysis requirement.
